question: Bagaimana mendefinisikan liveness probe pada container di dalam StatefulSet?

ground_truth.answer: Path graph untuk liveness probe pada StatefulSet melewati 4 hop: StatefulSet → StatefulSetSpec → PodTemplateSpec → Container → Probe (livenessProbe). Probe mendefinisikan cara Kubernetes mendeteksi apakah container masih berjalan. Tipe probe yang tersedia: httpGet, tcpSocket, exec, dan grpc. Probe dengan httpGet memerlukan path dan port.
context: StatefulSetSpec: spec of the desired behavior of the StatefulSet
PodTemplateSpec: describes the data a pod should have when created
Probe: describes a health check to be performed against a container to determine whether it is alive or ready
